camera_trajectory.selection: 100 evenly spaced indices including first and last
camera_trajectory.projection: center crop source field of view to 16:9, then render at 1920x1080
camera_trajectory.ground_truth: matching official source photograph, cropped identically and area-resized at metric time

timing.renderer_order: deterministic case-index rotation; full five-case all-renderer runs form a balanced Latin rotation
timing.fps_formula: total frames / total synchronized wall seconds

memory.secondary: framework allocated and reserved peak MiB

quality.views: the same 100 ordered canonical cameras used for timing
quality.psnr: mean of per-view RGB PSNR, data_range=1
quality.ssim: mean of per-view RGB SSIM, 11x11 Gaussian window
quality.lpips: mean of per-view LPIPS-vgg, inputs in [-1,1]
